name: GET /api/logs/usage
description:
Retrieve metered usage logs with search and pagination.
Admins see entire tenant usage. Users see their own.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.value: {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/logs/usage', 'details': {'tags': ['logs'], 'summary': 'Get My Usage Logs', 'description': 'Retrieve metered usage logs with search and pagination.\nAdmins see entire tenant usage. Users see their own.', 'operationId': 'get_my_usage_logs_api_logs_usage_get', 'security': [{'OAuth2PasswordBearer': []}], 'parameters': [{'name': 'search', 'in': 'query', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'Search'}}, {'name': 'limit', 'in': 'query', 'required': False, 'schema': {'type': 'integer', 'default': 50, 'title': 'Limit'}}, {'name': 'offset', 'in': 'query', 'required': False, 'schema': {'type': 'integer', 'default': 0, 'title': 'Offset'}}, {'name': 'X-Token', 'in': 'header', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'X-Token'}}], 'responses': {'200': {'description': 'Successful Response', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'type': 'array', 'items': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/UsageLogResponse'}, 'title': 'Response Get My Usage Logs Api Logs Usage Get'}}}}, '422': {'description': 'Validation Error', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError'}}}}}}}
